We reported last Thursday the Early Sharp Group Buy on the Under in long time game. There has been follow through buying as well and we expect the public to keep pounding the over up until kickoff!

Miami-Indiana Under 47.5

PLAY OF THE DAY
Miami - Indiana Under 47.5

Both teams are coming off of very high scoring games which has influenced this num. Both teams can put up points but more importantly both teams rank in the top 5 defensively in points allowed. We expect a close low scoring game here while the public is rooting for a shootout. It's a similar setup to the Beasr-Game game last night. Coming off high scoring games, public expects a repeat but the sharps are taking advantage of the inflated number. It is a dead sharp-square bet here.

GW +1.5
Suns-Nets Under 216.5
Miami +8
Sabres +150

Football Info
From one of the sharpest sportsbook risk managers...

It's a unique setup tonight. We need Indiana to win the game to erase the Miami Futures Liabilities, but we need Miami to cover 8 because everyone is betting Miami to cover.

If we could get Indiana to win by 1 or 2 and the game to stay under, it could be a perfect scenario for us.

We found a sneaky spot in College Basketball that is on of the strongest Vegas indicators we have seen in a while... George Mason is a quiet 17-1 with their only loss being at Virginia Tech. They are an incredible 12-0 at home this year and yet they are only 1.5 pt favs today. It's a tough spot for them and we like GW to get the upset.

Teams with a 90% or greater win percentage that aren't ranked and favored by less than 3 at home are just 3-7 (25%) ATS in the past 7 years. We'll take a 75% trend all day.

GW +1.5

BOOK BENEFITS
The Books will benefit most if these teams cover and really benefit if they win outright.

- Mia-Ind Under (NCAAF)
- Flames
